title: clompanus barteri
intro: Clompanus barteri, also known as the African Pear or the Pear Apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is a medicinal plant native to tropical Africa, used for its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clompanus barteri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, Clompanus barteri is often used as a decoction, made by steeping the root or bark in hot water, to create a medicinal tea.
